results.rendered_html:
anukram 1 U., 4 P.
1 To go after, follow (fig. also); maharṣibhiranukrāṃtaṃ dharmapaṃthānamāsthitaḥ  Rām. ; to betake oneself to; tīrthayātrāmanukrāman  Mb. ; vyavasāyamanukrāṃtā kāṃte tvamatiśobhanaṃ  Rām. 
2 To count up, enumerate, state or go through in order; yaccānukrāṃtaṃ yaccānukraṃsyate  Mbh.  on  P. I. 1. 72 ; give a table of contents, used frequently in the Nirukta.
